title: homolog atlas build config
description: JSON config consumed by dispatchers/build_homolog_atlas.sh via --config. CLI flags override config values where both are supplied.

query.description: Path to the query proteome (FASTA). The atlas is keyed by these protein IDs.

out_dir.description: Output directory. Created if missing. Holds homolog_atlas.holindx and (optionally) intermediates.

mode.description: miniprot preset. strict = single best hit per query (orthologue picking). chain = primary + paralog chains with gene context (recommended). loose = wide net for paralog/homolog discovery.

targets.description: Genomes to align the query proteome against (miniprot).

label.description: Source label written into the index. Recommend species or assembly id.

diamond_files.description: Pre-computed DIAMOND tabular hit files (-outfmt 6) to ingest directly.

diamond_subjects.description: Subject proteomes to run DIAMOND blastp against on the fly. The pipeline calls `diamond makedb` then `diamond blastp -q query -d <db> --outfmt 6`.

strict.use_case: Picking the single most likely orthologue per query.

chain.use_case: Default. Primary chain + tandem/segmental paralogs with gene context.
